stemHtml: When a lithium-ion battery pack is subjected to an overcurrent condition, what is the main hazard affecting the battery internally and its overall safety?

options.a: A severe, non-combustible chemical reaction that only reduces the battery's charge capacity.
options.b: Instantaneous, catastrophic physical rupture of the casing due to excessive gas buildup, but without fire.
options.c: Serious internal damage to the battery and the initiation of a thermal runaway event leading to fire.
options.d: Thermal runaway, but the high internal pressure guarantees the resulting incident is not explosive.
